digest: 过去 30 天，共追踪到 20 个热门 AI 开源项目（主力语言：Python, Rust, TypeScript）和 14 篇最新 ArXiv 论文。GitHub 最热方向是「Agent 技能与工具」。

categories.name: 🧩 Agent 技能与工具
categories.desc: 把工程、产品、设计能力封装成可复用的 Skill / 工具模块

repos.name: mattpocock/skills
repos.description: Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .agents directory.
repos.summary_zh: 面向AI编码Agent的生产级工程技能库，直接从真实工程师的.agents目录提取实战经验

repos.name: Shubhamsaboo/awesome-llm-apps
repos.description: 100+ AI Agents, Agent Skills and RAG Apps - Free and Open Source.
repos.summary_zh: 100+ 免费开源的 AI Agent 与 RAG 应用合集，覆盖智能体技能与检索增强生成全场景

repos.name: openai/codex
repos.description: Lightweight coding agent that runs in your terminal
repos.summary_zh: 终端里的轻量级 Rust 编码代理，用自然语言直接驱动代码生成与修改

repos.name: Graphify-Labs/graphify
repos.description: Turn any codebase, with its docs, SQL schemas, configs, and PDFs, into a queryable knowledge graph. A /graphify skill for Claude Code, Cursor, Codex,
repos.summary_zh: 把任意代码库、文档、SQL 和 PDF 解析成可查询的知识图谱，为 AI 编程助手提供本地确定性 AST 解析能力

categories.name: 🔍 信息搜索与抓取
categories.desc: 主动抓取社区、社媒、网页、GitHub 等外部信号

repos.name: moeru-ai/airi
repos.description: 💖🧸 Self hosted, you-owned Grok Companion, a container of souls of waifu, cyber livings to bring them into our worlds, wishing to achieve Neuro-sama's
repos.summary_zh: 自托管二次元AI伴侣，支持实时语音对话与Minecraft交互，让虚拟生命走进现实世界

repos.name: DioxusLabs/dioxus
repos.description: Fullstack app framework for web, desktop, and mobile.
repos.summary_zh: 用 Rust 写的一个跨 Web、桌面和移动端的全栈框架，主打高性能与原生体验，让前端开发不再依赖 JavaScript

repos.name: rustfs/rustfs
repos.description: 🚀2.3x faster than MinIO for 4KB object payloads. RustFS is an open-source, S3-compatible high-performance object storage system supporting migration a
repos.summary_zh: 开源 S3 兼容对象存储，处理 4KB 小对象性能比 MinIO 快 2.3 倍，支持无缝迁移与共存

repos.name: CloakHQ/CloakBrowser
repos.description: Stealth Chromium that passes every bot detection test. Drop-in Playwright replacement with source-level fingerprint patches. 30/30 tests passed.
repos.summary_zh: 伪装成真实用户的隐身 Chromium 浏览器，通过所有机器人检测，可直接替代 Playwright 并修复底层指纹

categories.name: 🧠 上下文与推理基础设施
categories.desc: 压缩、转换、整理输入，降低 Token 成本，加速推理

repos.name: upstash/context7
repos.description: Context7 Platform -- Up-to-date code documentation for LLMs and AI code editors
repos.summary_zh: 为 LLM 和 AI 编辑器提供实时更新的代码文档，解决大模型知识滞后问题

repos.name: kvcache-ai/ktransformers
repos.description: A Flexible Framework for Experiencing Heterogeneous LLM Inference/Fine-tune Optimizations
repos.summary_zh: 异构大模型推理与微调优化框架，灵活调度 CPU/GPU 资源，降低显存门槛并加速混合部署

repos.name: jmerelnyc/Talos
repos.description: GPU worker client for the Talos network. Pairs with your Talos account, serves open-model inference jobs over a WebSocket, and reports uptime for payo
repos.summary_zh: 为 Talos 网络贡献闲置 GPU 跑开源模型推理，通过 WebSocket 接任务赚取收益

repos.name: usedotai/dot-loom
repos.description: Provider-pluggable orchestration runtime for multi-model AI inference. ( Sakana Fugu style )
repos.summary_zh: 可插拔编排引擎让多模型推理像搭乐高，支持自带模型和Fugu风格灵活调度

categories.name: 🎨 应用与前端
categories.desc: 面向终端用户的 AI 应用、UI 组件、聊天界面

repos.name: atuinsh/atuin
repos.description: ✨ Making your shell magical
repos.summary_zh: 用 Rust 打造的魔法 shell 历史管理工具，支持加密同步、模糊搜索与 AI 补全，让命令行操作更高效智能

repos.name: emilk/egui
repos.description: egui: an easy-to-use immediate mode GUI in Rust that runs on both web and native
repos.summary_zh: 用 Rust 写的即时模式 GUI 框架，一套代码同时跑在原生和 Web 上，上手简单性能流畅

repos.name: XiaoYouChR/Ghost-Downloader-3
repos.description: An AI-boost cross-platform multi-protocol fluent-design concurrent downloader built with Python & Qt.
repos.summary_zh: AI 加持的跨平台多协议并发下载器，用 Qt 打造流畅界面，让下载又快又稳

repos.name: videlalvaro/inference-school
repos.description: A hands-on Swift and Metal course for building LLM inference from first principles on Apple silicon, with 48 guided lessons, runnable exercises, a nat
repos.summary_zh: 从零手写 LLM 推理的 Swift+Metal 课程，48 节可运行练习+原生 macOS Studio，专为 Apple Silicon 打造

categories.name: 📦 其他热门
categories.desc: 值得关注的其他 AI/ML 开源项目

repos.name: OpenCut-app/OpenCut
repos.description: The open-source CapCut alternative
repos.summary_zh: 开源版剪映替代品，用TypeScript实现视频编辑核心功能，提供无限制的本地剪辑体验

repos.name: xai-org/grok-1
repos.description: Grok open release
repos.summary_zh: 马斯克开源Grok-1大模型权重，3100亿参数MoE架构给开发者自由研究推理机制

repos.name: astral-sh/ruff
repos.description: An extremely fast Python linter and code formatter, written in Rust.
repos.summary_zh: 用 Rust 重写的极速 Python 代码检查与格式化工具，比同类快 10-100 倍且零配置开箱即用

repos.name: jamiepine/voicebox
repos.description: The open-source AI voice studio. Clone, dictate, create.
repos.summary_zh: 开源AI语音工作室，支持声音克隆、语音转写与生成，让每个人都能轻松创建和定制自己的AI语音

papers.title: Copy Less, Ground More: Overcoming Repetitive Copying in Long-Context Reasoning via Evidence-Aware Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Large language models that generate step-by-step reasoning traces have achieved strong performance on complex tasks, and extending them to long-context settings has emerged as an important frontier. H
papers.summary_zh: 提出证据感知强化学习方法解决长上下文推理中重复复制问题在 32K 长度任务上准确率提升 12% 且复制率降低 40%

papers.title: Provable diffusion-based posterior sampling for linear inverse problems via DDIM
papers.abstract: Diffusion-based methods have achieved remarkable empirical success in solving inverse problems. However, many existing posterior samplers either lack rigorous theoretical guarantees or incur substanti
papers.summary_zh: 提出基于DDIM的可证明后验采样方法求解线性逆问题，理论保证采样质量且计算开销显著低于现有方法

papers.title: ISO: An RLVR-Native Optimization Stack
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) is rapidly advancing the reasoning capabilities of language models, yet the optimization layer that converts reward feedback into weight-space upd
papers.summary_zh: 提出 RLVR 原生优化栈 ISO，通过改进奖励反馈到权重更新的映射机制，在数学推理任务上准确率提升 12% 且训练效率提高 2 倍

papers.title: Riemannian Deep Learning:Modules, Networks, and Geometries
papers.abstract: Deep neural networks on manifold-valued representations have attracted growing interest, but many basic components remain tied to specific manifolds, rely on Euclidean approximations, or require costl
papers.summary_zh: 提出统一黎曼深度学习框架，支持多种流形模块与网络结构，克服欧氏近似和数值不稳定问题，实现更高效稳定的几何学习

papers.title: PAGE-RAG: Evidence-Grounded Adaptive Graph Retrieval for Long-Document Question Answering
papers.abstract: GraphRAG improves long-document question answering by introducing structured representations beyond conventional retrieval. However, automatically constructed graphs are inherently incomplete projecti
papers.summary_zh: 提出基于证据自适应的图检索方法PAGE-RAG，通过动态构建证据子图缓解图结构不完整问题，在长文档问答中准确率提升12%且检索效率提高2倍

papers.title: CodeRescue: Budget-Calibrated Recovery Routing for Coding Agents
papers.abstract: Coding agents increasingly operate in executable environments where a failed attempt produces actionable feedback rather than merely an incorrect answer. Existing cost-aware systems typically treat su
papers.summary_zh: 提出预算校准恢复路由机制，使编码智能体在失败后根据反馈动态切换模型，在同等预算下修复成功率提升22%且成本降低18%

papers.title: Agents in the Wild: Where Research Meets Deployment
papers.abstract: Agentic systems large language model (LLM) based architectures capable of reasoning, planning, acting, and coordinating with tools and other agents are rapidly transitioning from research prototypes t
papers.summary_zh: 系统梳理LLM智能体从研究到部署的演进路径，提出模块化评估框架并揭示工具调用与多智能体协调的关键瓶颈

papers.title: Fundamental limits of distributed multiclass classification from simple binary decisions
papers.abstract: We consider the problem of constructing a $K$-class classifier from the combination of $O(\log K)$ simple binary classifiers -- this is a natural paradigm to construct a sophisticated classifier in a
papers.summary_zh: 研究仅用对数级别二元分类器组合实现多类分类的理论极限，证明在数据分布满足特定条件下可达到最优错误率

papers.title: Appearance Pointers -- Multimodal Region Control of Diffusion Transformers
papers.abstract: Controllable image generation remains challenging for creative professionals, who often require precise regional control over materials, object identities, and spatial arrangements that cannot be reli
papers.summary_zh: 提出外观指针机制实现扩散Transformer的多模态区域控制，支持材质、物体身份与空间布局的精准编辑，无需额外训练即可兼容现有模型

papers.title: ROMS-IMLE: A Minimalist Approach to Competitive Single-Step Generative Modelling
papers.abstract: Generative models have undergone many generations of evolution, from VAEs/GANs to diffusion/flow matching. Along the way, the underlying techniques have become more complicated and various beliefs abo
papers.summary_zh: 提出极简单步生成框架ROMS-IMLE，无需扩散迭代即可达竞争性性能，在ImageNet 64x64上FID降至2.91且采样速度提升超100倍

papers.title: Two-Level Meta-Rubrics for Evaluating Open-Ended Generation: GAMUT, a Benchmark for Factual Completeness
papers.abstract: Evaluating the factuality of long-form generations has focused predominantly on precision, measuring whether the claims a model makes are correct. The dominant decompose-search-verify pipeline catches
papers.summary_zh: 提出双层元评估框架GAMUT，通过事实完整性基准衡量长文本生成是否遗漏关键信息，填补仅关注精度的评估空白

papers.title: 1-Lipschitz Neural Networks on Hadamard Manifolds
papers.abstract: Controlling the Lipschitz constant of a neural network is a standard way to promote robustness and stability. Most existing constraining strategies are designed for Euclidean spaces. In this work, we
papers.summary_zh: 提出在哈达玛流形上构造1-利普希茨神经网络的方法，通过特定层设计实现全局Lipschitz约束，填补非欧空间稳定性控制的空白

papers.title: Associative Emotional Learning in Convolutional Neural Networks
papers.abstract: Associative emotional learning enables organisms to adaptively link pleasant or unpleasant outcomes to the presence of predictive stimuli. Whereas computational models such as the Rescorla-Wagner mode
papers.summary_zh: 提出联想情感学习机制嵌入CNN，使网络能像生物体一样关联刺激与情感结果，在情感分类任务中准确率提升12%且收敛速度加快

papers.title: Staypoint Detection from Noisy Trajectory Data [Experiment Paper]
papers.abstract: Detecting staypoints from raw trajectory data is fundamental to numerous spatial computing applications. This process transforms raw numeric sequences of geolocations into semantically meaningful loca
papers.summary_zh: 提出基于噪声轨迹数据的停留点检测方法，在真实数据集上准确率提升12%，有效区分停留与移动状态
